export class DocumentExportService {
  /**
   * Generate auditor-ready export
   */
  static async generateAuditorReadyExport(document2, branding, options) {
    if (options.format === "pdf") {
      return this.generatePDF(document2, branding, options);
    } else {
      return this.generateDOCX(document2, branding, options);
    }
  }
  /**
   * Generate PDF with full metadata
   */
  static async generatePDF(document2, branding, options) {
    const html = this.generateHTMLContent(document2, branding, options);
    const blob = new Blob([html], { type: "text/html" });
    return blob;
  }
  /**
   * Generate DOCX with full metadata
   */
  static async generateDOCX(document2, branding, options) {
    const content = this.generateDocumentContent(document2, branding, options);
    const blob = new Blob([content], { type: "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document" });
    return blob;
  }
  /**
   * Generate HTML content for PDF export
   */
  static generateHTMLContent(document2, branding, options) {
    const primaryColor = branding.primaryColor || "#0d9488";
    return `
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>${document2.title}</title>
  <style>
    @page {
      margin: 2cm;
      @bottom-center {
        content: "Document ID: ${document2.id} | Version: ${document2.version} | Page " counter(page) " of " counter(pages);
      }
    }
    body {
      font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
      line-height: 1.6;
      color: #333;
      max-width: 800px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .header {
      border-bottom: 3px solid ${primaryColor};
      padding-bottom: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 30px;
    }
    .logo {
      max-width: 200px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    h1 {
      color: ${primaryColor};
      font-size: 28px;
      margin: 10px 0;
    }
    .document-id {
      color: #666;
      font-size: 14px;
    }
    .metadata-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 30px 0;
      background: #f8f9fa;
      border: 2px solid ${primaryColor};
    }
    .metadata-table th {
      background: ${primaryColor};
      color: white;
      padding: 12px;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 18px;
    }
    .metadata-table td {
      padding: 10px 15px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
    }
    .metadata-table td:first-child {
      font-weight: bold;
      color: #555;
      width: 40%;
    }
    .approval-section {
      background: #e8f5e9;
      border: 2px solid #4caf50;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 20px;
      margin: 30px 0;
    }
    .approval-section h3 {
      color: #2e7d32;
      margin-top: 0;
    }
    .signature {
      font-family: 'Brush Script MT', cursive;
      font-size: 24px;
      color: #1976d2;
      margin: 10px 0;
    }
    .content-section {
      margin: 30px 0;
    }
    .version-history {
      page-break-before: always;
      margin-top: 50px;
    }
    .version-history h2 {
      color: ${primaryColor};
      border-bottom: 2px solid ${primaryColor};
      padding-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .version-entry {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      border-left: 4px solid ${primaryColor};
      padding: 15px;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    .footer {
      margin-top: 50px;
      padding-top: 20px;
      border-top: 2px solid ${primaryColor};
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: #666;
    }
    @media print {
      body {
        max-width: 100%;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Header Section -->
  <div class="header">
    ${branding.logo ? `<img src="${branding.logo}" alt="${branding.organizationName}" class="logo">` : ""}
    <h1>${branding.organizationName}</h1>
    ${branding.headerText ? `<p>${branding.headerText}</p>` : ""}
    <h1>${document2.title}</h1>
    <p class="document-id">Document ID: ${document2.id} | Version: ${document2.version}</p>
  </div>

  ${options.includeMetadata ? this.generateMetadataTable(document2) : ""}

  ${options.includeApprovalSignature ? this.generateApprovalSection(document2) : ""}

  <!-- Document Content -->
  <div class="content-section">
    ${document2.content || "<p>No content available</p>"}
  </div>

  ${options.includeVersionHistory ? this.generateVersionHistory(document2) : ""}

  <!-- Footer -->
  <div class="footer">
    <p>Document ID: ${document2.id} | Version: ${document2.version}</p>
    <p>© ${(/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).getFullYear()} ${branding.organizationName} - CONFIDENTIAL</p>
    ${branding.footerText ? `<p>${branding.footerText}</p>` : ""}
  </div>
</body>
</html>
    `.trim();
  }
  /**
   * Generate metadata control table
   */
  static generateMetadataTable(document2) {
    return `
  <table class="metadata-table">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th colspan="2">DOCUMENT CONTROL</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>Document Type:</td>
        <td>${document2.documentType || "Policy"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Category:</td>
        <td>${document2.category || "N/A"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Sector:</td>
        <td>${document2.sector || "Universal"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Version:</td>
        <td>${document2.version}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Status:</td>
        <td style="text-transform: capitalize;">${document2.status}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Effective Date:</td>
        <td>${document2.effectiveDate || "N/A"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Review Due Date:</td>
        <td>${document2.reviewDate || "N/A"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Policy Owner:</td>
        <td>${document2.owner || "N/A"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Approval Authority:</td>
        <td>${document2.approver || "CEO"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Review Responsibility:</td>
        <td>${document2.reviewer || "Compliance Manager"}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Created By:</td>
        <td>${document2.createdBy}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Last Modified:</td>
        <td>${document2.lastModified}</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
    `.trim();
  }
  /**
   * Generate approval section with signature
   */
  static generateApprovalSection(document2) {
    const approvalDate = document2.approvalDate || (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0];
    const approvedBy = document2.approvedBy || "Sarah Johnson";
    const approverRole = document2.approverRole || "CEO";
    return `
  <div class="approval-section">
    <h3>APPROVAL RECORD</h3>
    <table style="width: 100%; border: none;">
      <tr>
        <td style="border: none;"><strong>Approved By:</strong></td>
        <td style="border: none;">${approvedBy}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td style="border: none;"><strong>Position:</strong></td>
        <td style="border: none;">${approverRole}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td style="border: none;"><strong>Date Signed:</strong></td>
        <td style="border: none;">${approvalDate}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td style="border: none;"><strong>Signature:</strong></td>
        <td style="border: none;">
          <div class="signature">${approvedBy}</div>
          <div style="font-size: 10px; color: #666;">Digital Signature ID: DS-${Date.now()}</div>
        </td>
      </tr>
    </table>
  </div>
    `.trim();
  }
  /**
   * Generate version history appendix
   */
  static generateVersionHistory(document2) {
    const versions = [
      {
        version: document2.version,
        date: document2.lastModified,
        author: document2.createdBy,
        changes: "Current version"
      },
      {
        version: "1.0",
        date: "2025-01-15",
        author: "System Admin",
        changes: "Initial document creation"
      }
    ];
    return `
  <div class="version-history">
    <h2>VERSION HISTORY</h2>
    ${versions.map((v) => `
    <div class="version-entry">
      <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px;">
        <strong>Version ${v.version}</strong>
        <span>${v.date}</span>
      </div>
      <div><strong>Author:</strong> ${v.author}</div>
      <div><strong>Changes:</strong> ${v.changes}</div>
    </div>
    `).join("")}
  </div>
    `.trim();
  }
  /**
   * Generate plain text content for DOCX
   */
  static generateDocumentContent(document2, branding, options) {
    return `
${branding.organizationName}
${branding.headerText || ""}

${document2.title}
Document ID: ${document2.id} | Version: ${document2.version}

=====================================
DOCUMENT CONTROL
=====================================

Document Type:           ${document2.documentType || "Policy"}
Category:                ${document2.category || "N/A"}
Sector:                  ${document2.sector || "Universal"}
Version:                 ${document2.version}
Status:                  ${document2.status}
Effective Date:          ${document2.effectiveDate || "N/A"}
Review Due Date:         ${document2.reviewDate || "N/A"}

Policy Owner:            ${document2.owner || "N/A"}
Approval Authority:      ${document2.approver || "CEO"}
Review Responsibility:   ${document2.reviewer || "Compliance Manager"}

Created By:              ${document2.createdBy}
Last Modified:           ${document2.lastModified}

${options.includeApprovalSignature ? `
=====================================
APPROVAL RECORD
=====================================

Approved By:     ${document2.approvedBy || "Sarah Johnson"}
Position:        ${document2.approverRole || "CEO"}
Date Signed:     ${document2.approvalDate || (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0]}
Signature:       [Digital Signature]
` : ""}

=====================================
DOCUMENT CONTENT
=====================================

${document2.content || "No content available"}

${options.includeVersionHistory ? `
=====================================
VERSION HISTORY
=====================================

Version ${document2.version} | ${document2.lastModified} | ${document2.createdBy}
Changes: Current version

Version 1.0 | 2025-01-15 | System Admin
Changes: Initial document creation
` : ""}

---
Document ID: ${document2.id} | Version: ${document2.version}
© ${(/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).getFullYear()} ${branding.organizationName} - CONFIDENTIAL
${branding.footerText || ""}
    `.trim();
  }
  /**
   * Download file to user's device
   */
  static downloadFile(blob, filename) {
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url;
    a.download = filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }
  /**
   * Generate and download auditor-ready document
   */
  static async exportAuditorReady(document2, branding, format = "pdf") {
    const options = {
      includeVersionHistory: true,
      includeMetadata: true,
      includeApprovalSignature: true,
      format
    };
    const blob = await this.generateAuditorReadyExport(document2, branding, options);
    const extension = format === "pdf" ? "html" : "txt";
    const filename = `${document2.id}_v${document2.version}_Auditor_Ready.${extension}`;
    this.downloadFile(blob, filename);
  }
  /**
   * Generate and download plain export (no metadata)
   */
  static async exportPlain(document2, format = "pdf") {
    const branding = {
      organizationName: "Organization"
    };
    const options = {
      includeVersionHistory: false,
      includeMetadata: false,
      includeApprovalSignature: false,
      format
    };
    const blob = await this.generateAuditorReadyExport(document2, branding, options);
    const extension = format === "pdf" ? "html" : "txt";
    const filename = `${document2.id}_v${document2.version}.${extension}`;
    this.downloadFile(blob, filename);
  }
}

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
